headline: Nvidia’s GTC 2026 Arrives: Six Key Things Investors Are Watching Out For
summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia’s (NVDA) closely followed four-day GPU Technology Conference (GTC) 2026 is set to commence later today with a keynote address from CEO Jensen Huang. Analysts and investors alike are looking for updates on several key areas from the annual developer conference. This includes a possible announcement on an inference chip with Groq, a roadmap for the Vera Rubin successor Feynman, a strategy to rival Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) in the central processing unit

headline: Intel’s New CEO Has Completed His First Year. Here’s Where Things Stand.
summary: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) shareholders have watched the stock climb 90.27% over the past year and 24.01% year-to-date. Those numbers frame the question: has Lip-Bu Tan, who stepped in as CEO in early 2025 following Pat Gelsinger’s ouster, actually turned Intel around, or has the market gotten ahead of the story? The honest answer lies somewhere ... Intel’s New CEO Has Completed His First Year. Here’s Where Things Stand.

headline: Celestica Deepens AI Data Center Role Through New AMD Helios Partnership
summary: Celestica (TSX:CLS) has entered a collaboration with AMD to design and manufacture networking switches for AMD's upcoming Helios rack scale AI platform. The partnership focuses on next generation AI platform networking hardware aimed at cloud, enterprise, and research customers. The Helios platform is intended to support advanced, open standards based AI solutions across high performance infrastructure environments. headline: AMD Helios AI Platform Collaboration Puts Valuation And Adoption In Focus
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) and Celestica announced a collaboration on the Helios rack scale AI platform for large scale AI deployments. The Helios platform is designed around AMD Instinct AI accelerators and open standards based networking, including Ultra Accelerator Link over Ethernet. Helios is planned to be available to cloud, enterprise, and research customers in late 2026 as part of AMD’s expanding AI infrastructure ecosystem. Advanced Micro Devices enters this...

headline: Nvidia Makes Trillion-Dollar Forecast at Annual Product Expo
summary: During a 2 1/2-hour keynote address, Huang announced plans to push deeper into central processing units — Intel Corp.’s home turf — and introduced semiconductors made with technology acquired from startup Groq.  The company even said it was developing chips for data centers in outer space.  At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.

At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.
